data.name: Slay the Demon Queen
data.detailed_description:
Slay the Demon Queen is a casual lewd game with match 3 gameplay.

You play the hero summoned to this fantasy realm to put and end to the Demon Queen's suffering.

The Demon Queen has been long ailed by a curse.

Her mother's succubus blood was greatly enhanced by her father's dragon blood. leaving her unable to touch anyone without causing them great harm.

After uniting the demons and putting an end to a centuries long war with the humans. the gods saw fit to reward her by summoning a man from another world, one capable of surviving her touch. It's time for her to finally get dicked down and feed on your seed as nature intended.

The core gameplay loop is as follows

Attempt to satisfy the Demon Queen, Earn Points, upgrade stats,
Eventually get strong enough to completely satisfy her.

Features

  • 1 Animated Live2d Succubus to dick down

  • 5 erotic animations; blowjob, titfuck, thighjob, doggy style, and MATING PRESS

  • Simple and Fun match 3 gameplay with lots of juice!

  • hand drawn pictures showing how well you did, from drowning her sorrows to attaining happiness she could never have dared dream for.

  • Character customisation unlocked on completion; glasses, bust size, and hair / claw colour options

Expected completion time: 1 hour

data.short_description: When the Demon Queen who brought peace is cursed and about to destroy the world, it's up to the chosen hero from another world to plow her hard enough to satisfy her sexual cravings—WAIT, WHAT?!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 80 MB 可用空間
